name: Build libanka_quantum.so (Android arm64)

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'core/quantum/**'
      - '.github/workflows/build-android.yml'
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install Zig
        uses: goto-bus-stop/setup-zig@v2
        with:
          version: 0.13.0

      - name: Build shared library (aarch64-linux-android)
        run: |
          cd core/quantum
          zig cc -target aarch64-linux-android -shared -fPIC -O3 \
            -o libanka_quantum.so \
            collapse_engine.c quantum_dust.c sinek_fsm.c
          file libanka_quantum.so
          ls -la libanka_quantum.so

      - name: Upload .so artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: libanka_quantum-so
          path: core/quantum/libanka_quantum.so
          if-no-files-found: error
          retention-days: 30
